title: Paralegal
description:
Job requirements

The team is currently growing and we are seeking a Paralegal who has efficient proficiency in both English and other language skills including Thai, Vietnamese, Khmer and/or Laotian to support our Singapore-based insurance practice in developing Southeast Asian clients and working on instructions from the region. The role presents a fantastic opportunity to join an international ﬁrm of industry experts, acting on behalf of a growing and diverse local and international client base.

Key responsibilities

• Conducting legal research related to a broad spectrum of contentious and non-contentious practice areas

• Assist in conducting legal and regulatory research on the Indonesian market to support cross-border transactions

• Translating and communicating in English and foreign language skills (written and oral).

• Preparing documents summarising findings from document review (e.g. tables)

• Assisting lawyers and secretaries with arbitration bundling and document production: photocopying and scanning as required, filing, collating and binding large volumes of matter correspondence and documentation

• Cataloguing books and journals and helping to administer subscriptions and access to relevant legal and market information and databases

• Drafting and reviewing legal documents, including agreements, resolutions, and policies;

• Conducting large document reviews and proof reading of materials; and

Candidate proﬁle

• Educated to Diploma in Law level, or local or foreign equivalent qualification

• Excellent attention to detail and able to manage competing priorities and work with tight timelines

• Proven ability to work as part of a successful team

• Strong research and problem solving skills

• Proven initiative and ability to work independently

• Excellent English verbal and written communication skills

postedCompany.description:
CLYDE & CO CLASIS SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.    

A pragmatic and dynamic international law firm with a focus on core sectors of infrastructure, insurance, international trade, natural resources and transportation. Clyde & Co is recognised for its work in and with fast-moving and volatile emerging markets, and for a history of managing complex, multi-jurisdictional transactions and disputes.

Internationally, with more than 3,600 staff across six continents, we are on the front line for our clients' interests, all over the world. Our culture is one that is based on our integrity, enjoyment of work and a spirit of adventure that runs through everything we do.

Clyde & Co is a truly entrepreneurial firm, always seeking new opportunities. We have had a presence in the Asia Pacific region for over 30 years, during which time we have invested in building a network of market leading specialists who support our clients' international and regional growth strategies. The last three years in particular have been a time of rapid growth and network expansion in Asia Pacific; we currently have around 350 directly-employed staff in-region.  Our regional network includes presence in: Hong Kong, Shanghai, Beijing, Chongqing, Ulaanbaatar, Singapore, Jakarta, Mumbai, New Delhi, Sydney, Brisbane, Melbourne and Perth, as well as working closely with Clyde & Co offices around the world.

* Local law Joint venture also in place

** Associated office
